holdings.infoBox: EVLU is an equity ETF with a total of 283 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 5.26%, Hon Hai Precision Industry at 5.15%, United Microelectronics at 4.77%, Quanta Computer at 3.16%, and China Construction Bank at 2.76%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Emerging Markets Value Factor ETF (EVLU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap stocks from emerging markets, selected for their high value scores. The portfolio is market cap-weighted with tilts based on their value and quality scores derived from fundamental metrics. EVLU was launched on Sep 4, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.
